title: Rainbow Elytra!
description: A vanilla reskin of the elytra to make it rainbow!
body: This is a vanilla reskin of the elytra to be rainbow! I figured it would go along great with my rainbow fireworks that I posted as well.  Please note like my other elytra it is best to use this without a cape on as minecraft makes your cape skin the elytra skin.  Thank you for all the support! I appreciate all of you so much!!!
